channel.title: WeeklySeries on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in WeeklySeries on Zymacs

item.title: Last Week In Code -002-
item.description:
Last Week In Code -002-

Yello, second episode for the series. First , Updates from Me

Updates from Me

Discovering hacker news

Last week I decided I’d be going on an AI fast. Listed what services AI was providing me and tried to get alternative providers. For the mindless AI usage, I think the underlying cause was boredom. I chose to use that time to read. I’ve heard about Hacker News before but I’d never read much from the website. Well I discovered its way more than I thought. Which was , not much. A collection point for quite a number of real good articles, most written by developers. News obviously. I found that most updates made it to Hacker News before my Youtube sources made any videos on them. Also, there’s a whole lot of real technical readers in the comment sections for the posts so its a humbling experience the realization you have a long way to go. Plus, its a good place to get contributors or .. to just collect valuable eyeballls for Engineering projects. I can’t promise to write one since my schedule ain’t stable yet but I surely should make an article on just Hacker News. The good, the bad. But mostly the good. Also, thinking of adding a section to collect my top articles of the week to this post. I read quite a lot of them and would like to share.

item.title: Last Week In Code -001-
item.description:
Last week in code -001-

The beginning of a new chapter

I find I always have a whole lot to talk about at the end of every week. And that most of it is from the tech space. I attend this Software Club meeting every Thursday where I try to use some of that time to talk about the latest developments with people who get it. We exchange opinions on things we’re building. You know how that is. So I was like, how about I create something here that’ll be an outlet for that? So I did. Like many things I’ve started, I can’t be sure this will last. But I won’t try to preemptively kill it either. May the Force be with it. This week, I’m shipping the skeleton and letting the structure emerge naturally as I pump in more episodes. My consumption is personal, so what I include might skew toward my interests. Beware :)
